title: Addition Preserves Order
statement:
Let $(P,S,1)$ be a Peano system. For every $a,b,c \in P$,
\[
a \le b \Longrightarrow a+c \le b+c
\qquad\text{and}\qquad
a \le b \Longrightarrow c+a \le c+b.
\]

current_dependencies.title: Addition Preserves Order on the Left
Addition Preserves Order on the Right
